title: LEM Template Pack Manifest
description: Public contract for template.json inside a Live Event Manager template pack ZIP.

lem_format.description: Manifest format version. Bump when breaking fields change; core rejects formats newer than LEM_FORMAT_VERSION.

slug.description: Must match the ZIP top-level folder name; cannot be "default".

files.description: Extra relative paths allowed in ZIP beyond the default install set.

requires_lem.description: Minimum plugin version, e.g. ">=1.2.0". Checked on install and activate.

preview_url.description: HTTPS preview image for the Templates admin screen.

license.description: SPDX id or short label for display only; not enforced by core.

update_url.description: Reserved. Core does not fetch updates; marketplace plugins may use with lem_template_pack_update_response.

update_id.description: Reserved product id for a future update channel.

marketplace.description: Reserved. Ignored by core; for commercial companion plugins.

license_required.description: Reserved hint for licensing plugins; not enforced by core.
